title: Citation Networks for Graph Curvature Analysis
description: Three standard citation network datasets (Cora, CiteSeer, PubMed) downloaded from PyTorch Geometric Planetoid, converted to edge-list JSON format suitable for curvature computation.

datasets.name: cora
datasets.notes: Standard citation network benchmark. Edges are undirected (PyTorch Geometric ToUndirected transform).

datasets.name: citeseer
datasets.notes: Standard citation network benchmark. Edges are undirected.

datasets.name: pubmed
datasets.notes: Standard citation network benchmark. Largest of the three datasets.

cora.edges_note: 10556 undirected (published 5429 directed, so 10858 expected undirected - slight difference due to PyTorch Geometric preprocessing)

pubmed.edges_note: 88648 undirected (published 44338 directed, so 88676 expected undirected - close match)

usage.format_description: Each dataset JSON contains: dataset_name, num_nodes, num_edges, nodes (array of {id, label}), edges (array of {source, target, metadata})
usage.recommended_use: Load full_*.json for curvature computation. Use mini_*.json for development/testing. Use preview_*.json for quick inspection.
usage.next_steps: These edge lists are ready for graph curvature computation (e.g., Ollivier-Ricci, Forman-Ricci). Node labels can be used for stratification or classification tasks.
